about.label: About Us
about.title: A reliable partner for your production
about.text1: SOD EAST TRADE HOUSE LLC is a company specializing in the supply of industrial equipment, components and comprehensive engineering solutions.
about.text2: We work with leading European manufacturers and provide a full cycle — from engineering calculations, selection and supply of equipment to installation, commissioning and service maintenance.

food.title: Food Industry
food.description: Soft drink plants, breweries, dairy plants, canning factories

products.label: Products
products.componentsSubtitle: Supply of equipment and components from leading European manufacturers
products.waterTreatmentStandard: SOD standard water treatment solutions include:

waterTreatment.title: Water Treatment
waterTreatment.description: Comprehensive water treatment solutions for various industries — from engineering calculations to turnkey equipment supply.
details: Mechanical filter (coarse filtration) — removes large impurities: sand, rust, silt. Protects subsequent equipment from clogging.
Fine filter — retains smaller particles (suspended solids), improves water clarity.
Carbon filter — removes chlorine, organic substances, unpleasant odors and tastes.
Water softener — reduces water hardness by removing calcium and magnesium salts (prevents scale).
Iron remover — removes iron and manganese, prevents water discoloration and deposits.
Reverse osmosis system — deep purification: removes up to 99% of dissolved substances, bacteria and salts.
UV sterilizer — disinfects water by destroying bacteria and viruses using ultraviolet light.
waterTreatment.footer: The entire system is connected by pipelines, equipped with pumping stations and tanks. All main components and elements are made of stainless steel, ensuring compliance with current quality standards, enhanced operational reliability and long equipment service life.

0.text: Mixing units are used for preparing sugar and salt solutions with specified concentrations. They ensure fast and uniform dissolving, product quality stability and compliance with sanitary requirements.

1.text: Equipment is used for dissolving and preparing components (salt, sugar, additives, marinades). Ensures solution homogeneity, dosing accuracy and recipe stability.

2.text: Mixing units are used for blending and dissolving chemical substances. They ensure uniform component distribution, process parameter control and production efficiency.

0.text: Equipment is used for metered supply of brines, marinades, additives and other ingredients. Ensures uniform component distribution, product quality repeatability and production process optimization.

1.text: Dosing units are designed for precise supply of chemical reagents to process lines. They ensure flow control, process safety and stability of chemical reactions.

0.text: CIP stations provide automated washing and disinfection of process equipment without disassembly, ensuring high hygiene levels, reduced downtime and stable end product quality.

1.text: CIP stations are designed for effective removal of fat, protein and mineral contamination. They ensure compliance with strict sanitary requirements and improve production safety.

2.text: CIP stations are used for comprehensive cleaning of tanks, pipelines and production lines, ensuring removal of product residues, reducing microbiological contamination risk and process stability.

3.text: CIP stations are used for cleaning equipment from reagent residues and reaction products, preventing cross-contamination, improving operational safety and production cycle efficiency.

tanks.title: Tank Equipment
tanks.description: Stainless steel tanks of various sizes — aseptic, mixing tanks, fermenters, buffer and storage vessels. Used in food, chemical, pharmaceutical and other industries.

heatExchangers.title: Heat Exchangers
heatExchangers.description: Plate heat exchangers for heating, cooling and pasteurization from leading company Alfa Laval. High heat transfer efficiency, compact dimensions, easy maintenance. Used in food, energy, chemical industries and heating systems.

valves.title: Valves
valves.description: Shut-off and control valves by ALFA LAVAL, KIESELMANN — seat, disc, shut-off and diverting valves. Precise flow control in pipeline systems of industrial enterprises.

pumps.title: Pumps
pumps.description: Centrifugal, rotary and diaphragm pumps for pumping liquids of various viscosities. Hygienic and industrial designs for any process applications.

automation.title: Automation Elements
automation.description: Sensors, controllers, actuators and control panels for process automation. Comprehensive solutions for real-time monitoring and control of production lines.
